calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Summary Judment
Off Calendar Feb-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BANKERS INSURANCE CO. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Summary Judment

Appearances:
Diana Rosenstein, Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-3933, Office of the City Attorney for Plaintiff the People of the State of California.
John Rorabaugh, Esq. 714-617-9600 for Defendant BANKERS INSURANCE CO.through Court Call.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Plaintiff argues Penal Code 1305(c)(3)and(c)(2). Defendant argues. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT BANKERS INSURANCE CO.'s Motion To Set Aside Summary Judment; Discharge Forfeiture and Exonerate Bail is taken under submission. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)
